title: Moderne EOL feed
description: A vendor-neutral, package-URL-keyed description of products and their release-cycle end-of-life dates, consumed by the end-of-life DevCenter cards (io.moderne.devcenter.eol). YAML is canonical; JSON validates against this same schema.

source.description: Where this feed was derived from.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the feed was produced.

name.description: Stable product slug used in the `products` allow-list and in reports, e.g. `spring-boot`.

coordinates.description: package-URL coordinates that map a detected artifact or runtime to this product.

items.description: pkg:maven/<groupId> (artifact is a wildcard), pkg:npm/<package>, pkg:nuget/<package>, pkg:generic/<runtime> (openjdk, node, dotnet, dotnetfx, python), or pkg:docker/<namespace>/<name>.

cycles.description: Release cycles, each matched to a version by longest dot-boundary prefix.

cycle.description: Release cycle name, e.g. `3.2`. Matches a version when it equals the version or is a dot-prefix of it (`3.2` matches `3.2.4`).

eolDate.description: ISO-8601 end-of-life date for the cycle, or null/omitted when unknown.

eol.description: Fallback flag used only when eolDate is absent: true means the cycle is end-of-life regardless of date.
